query:
SELECT id, userId, apiUrl, model, createdAt FROM user_api_configs LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, email, host, port, tls, active, updatedAt FROM imap_config ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 3;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 43pHZH57f8CsvmH.root --database cSHx67NTiqWRWuwYCEpu4V --execute SELECT id, userId, apiUrl, model, createdAt FROM user_api_configs LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, email, host, port, tls, active, updatedAt FROM imap_config ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 3;
